query:
-- 查詢需求單詳情
SELECT id, clientId, date, startTime, endTime, requiredWorkers, breakHours, status 
FROM demands 
WHERE id = 390142;

-- 查詢員工宇軒在該日期的所有指派記錄
SELECT a.id, a.demandId, a.workerId, a.scheduledStart, a.scheduledEnd, a.status, d.date, d.startTime, d.endTime, c.name as clientName
FROM assignments a
JOIN demands d ON a.demandId = d.id
JOIN clients c ON d.clientId = c.id
WHERE a.workerId IN (SELECT id FROM workers WHERE name LIKE '%宇軒%')
  AND DATE(a.scheduledStart) = (SELECT DATE(date) FROM demands WHERE id = 390142)
  AND a.status != 'cancelled'
ORDER BY a.scheduledStart;

SELECT a.id, a.demandId, a.workerId, a.scheduledStart, a.scheduledEnd, a.status, d.date, d.startTime, d.endTime, c.name as clientName
FROM assignments a
JOIN demands d ON a.demandId = d.id

WHERE a.workerId IN (SELECT id FROM workers WHERE name LIKE '%宇軒%')
  AND DATE(a.scheduledStart) = (SELECT DATE(date) FROM demands WHERE id = 390142)
  AND a.status != 'cancelled'
ORDER BY a.scheduledStart;
